# Protobuf-ES

> Buf's Protocol Buffers implementation for modern JavaScript and TypeScript.

Use this file as a map for agents and LLMs reading the documentation.

## Primary Pages

- /: README-style overview, positioning, comparison, quickstart, migration tables, packages, compatibility.
- /getting-started/: shortest end-to-end code generation flow with the Buf CLI and protoc.
- /working-with-messages/: create messages, initializer objects, identify messages, field presence, equals, clone.
- /serialization/: binary, JSON, options, unknown fields, wire helpers, text encoding, Base64, size-delimited streams.
- /extensions/: proto2 extensions, custom options, runtime helpers, JSON registry use.
- /reflection/: overview for descriptors, registries, custom options, reflection wrappers, dynamic message access.
- /reflection/descriptors/: descriptor hierarchy, schema traversal, field descriptors, traversal helpers.
- /reflection/registries/: descriptor lookup, mutable registries, descriptor-set loading.
- /reflection/custom-options/: defining and reading custom Protobuf options.
- /reflection/dynamic-messages/: ReflectMessage, ReflectList, ReflectMap.
- /writing-plugins/: minimal protoplugin workflow.
- /writing-plugins/generating-files/: generated files, printing, imports, exports.
- /writing-plugins/options/: custom plugin options, transpilation, release, testing.

## Reference Pages

- /reference/: reference map.
- /generated-code/: generated file, message, enum, extension, and service overview.
- /generated-code/field-types/: scalar, message, enum, repeated, map, and WKT field shapes.
- /generated-code/features/: oneofs, required fields, optional fields, services, reserved names, comments.
- /plugin-options/: protoc-gen-es options.
- /migrating-from-v1/: v1 to v2 migration reference.
- /well-known-types/: precompiled google.protobuf types and helpers.
- /json-types/: generated JSON type support.
- /valid-types/: experimental Valid type support.
- /faq/: design choices and troubleshooting.

## Package Names

- @bufbuild/protobuf: runtime library.
- @bufbuild/protoc-gen-es: standard Protobuf plugin for JS/TS generation.
- @bufbuild/protoplugin: framework for writing custom plugins in TypeScript.

## Examples

- /examples/: examples map.
- /examples/node-message-store/: Node.js size-delimited binary file example.
- /examples/twirp-plugin/: custom Twirp client plugin based on protoplugin-example.
- /examples/any-registry/: google.protobuf.Any with registries.
- /examples/custom-options-redaction/: custom options with reflection-based redaction.
